title: Link a pixel to ad accounts / Unlink
content:
Use this endpoint to link a pixel to ad accounts, or to unlink a pixel from ad accounts. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/bc/pixel/link/update/|/v1.3/bc/pixel/link/update/| |Request parameter data type|`bc_id`: number
`advertiser_ids`: number[]|`bc_id`: string
`advertiser_ids`: string[]| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/pixel/link/update/ **Method** POST **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required}|string| Business Center ID | |pixel_code {Required}|string|Pixel Code| |advertiser_ids {Required}|string[]|Advertiser ID list| |relation_status {Required}|string|Enum values: `LINK`, `UNLINK`.| ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request POST https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/pixel/link/update/ --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' \ --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \ --data-raw '{ "bc_id": "{{bc_id}}", "pixel_code": "{{pixel_code}}", "advertiser_ids": ["{{advertiser_id}}"], "relation_status": "LINK" }' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object|Returned data.| |request_id |string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code Success-Response http) HTTPS/1.1 200 OK { "code": 40104, "message": "The access_token is empty.", "request_id": "{{request_id}}" } (/code) ```
